targets.notes: Apple plans to reduce absolute greenhouse gas emissions by 75% between 2015 and 2030 across its full value chain before neutralizing residual emissions.
targets.title: 75% reduction in total GHG emissions by 2030 vs 2015

targets.notes: Apple aims to achieve carbon neutrality across its entire value chain by 2030 using emissions reductions and carbon removal for residual emissions.
targets.title: Net-zero (carbon neutral) across entire value chain by 2030

targets.boundary: Global corporate operations (Scope 1 and 2 facilities and electricity use)
targets.notes: Apple committed to and reports maintaining carbon neutrality for its global corporate operations from 2020 onward.
targets.title: Net-zero (carbon neutral) corporate operations by 2020
